prompt_text:
### Demographics: 72-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 77.3 kg; Height 171.8 cm; BMI 26.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 241mg/dL; 9 months ago 211mg/dL; 6 months ago 214mg/dL; 3 months ago 173mg/dL; current 132mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.3kg; 9 months ago 77.2kg; 6 months ago 76.8kg; 3 months ago 73.8kg; current 77.3kg), Height (12 months ago 171.8cm; 9 months ago 171.8cm; 6 months ago 171.8cm; 3 months ago 171.8cm; current 171.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 26.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 144mmHg; 9 months ago 145mmHg; 6 months ago 146mmHg; 3 months ago 144mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 91mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 89mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 11U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 14U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 14mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 10mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 413mg/g; 9 months ago 443mg/g; 6 months ago 432mg/g; 3 months ago 457mg/g; current 488mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 185mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 188mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.9g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
